/usr/bin/c++ -g -g -s SINGLE_FILE=1 --embed-file /mnt/c/TraceAndPace/frontend/src/assets@/assets --bind --emit-tsd TraceAndPace.d.mts CMakeFiles/TraceAndPace.dir/backend/main.cpp.o -o /mnt/c/TraceAndPace/frontend/src/wasm/TraceAndPace.mjs 
=======
